title: Dataset root descriptor
description: Optional root descriptor (dataset.json) a design-data dataset MAY carry to declare which optional directories are present, pin the targeted spec version, and override default discovery paths. Absence of this file is not an error; see spec/dataset-layout.md.

specVersion.description: The spec version this dataset targets (e.g. "1.0.0-draft").

directories.description: Declares which registered directories the dataset provides. Each value is true when the directory is present and authoritative for this dataset.

paths.description: Optional overrides for the default discovery paths, relative to the dataset root. When omitted, tooling uses the conventional directory names defined in spec/dataset-layout.md.
